tips_en: Start with Stream-R1, which achieves the highest VBench scores while surpassing its teacher model without extra inference cost, making it the most immediately impactful advance for streaming video generation. Stream-T1 offers a complementary test-time scaling perspective on the same streaming video problem. Meanwhile, ARIS operates at the meta-level, proposing a cross-family multi-agent framework that could eventually automate the kind of research that produces results like the first two.
tips_zh: 建议先阅读 Stream-R1，它在不增加推理成本的情况下超越教师模型并获得最高 VBench 分数，是对流式视频生成立即影响最大的进展。Stream-T1 从测试时缩放角度为同一问题提供了互补方案。而 ARIS 则在更高层面提出跨模型家族的多智能体协作框架，未来有望自主驱动类似前两项研究的创新。
